rawAssistant: Fresh signs on that one side road are always worth a look, especially with the weather lifting like this. You might want to take a closer sniff at what's caught the attention of our local scouts. I've heard tales of strange markings and faint scents that don't quite add up - could be nothing, but it's better to investigate than ignore.
